titleStmt.title: SII 24.62: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 62. (A.R. No. 125 of 1947-48.) III PRĀKĀRA, WEST WALL.

summary.p: Registers a gift of money for bringing land in Viḷānāḍu in Pāṇḍikulāśani-vaḷa nāḍu under cultivation by Teṉṉavan-Mādēviyār, the Queen of Rājēndradēva, (Kulōttuṅga I) towards provision for offerings to the god on the 5th day of Māśi. Mentions Nēriyaṉ Mādēvi-viḷāgam as one of the boundaries. Dated in the 15th year of the king's reign.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
pukaḻ mātu viḷaṅka jayamātu virumpa nilamakaḷ vaḷara malarmakaḷ virumpa Urimaiyiṟ
ṭi mīnavar nilaikeṭa villavar kulaitara vikkalan ciṅkaṇan mel kaṭalpāyt tikkaṉaittum tan cakkara naṭātti vīrasiṅhāsanattup puvana muḻutuṭaiyāḷoṭu vīṟṟirun=taruḷiya kovirājakesaripanmarāna cakravattikaḷ śrīkolottuṅka coḻatevaṟku yāṇṭu patinaiñcāvatu pāṇṭikulācanivaḷanāṭṭu viḷā nāṭṭuk kaṟkuṭi Ilā natina
ta kiṭanta nilam śrīvayiṣṇavavāriyam perumpuliyūr cakkarapāṇi nampiyum Ālam pā(ā)kkiḻāntiruvaraṅkamāḷi nampiyum Irāyūr paṟavaikkaracum periyakoyilamutum śrī caṭakopadāsarum nammūr nārāyaṇa nampiyum śrī paṇṭāravāriyam Āritan ti yān cirākavanum Āritan kecuvan tani Iḷañ ciṅkamum Āritan kurukai kāvalan Ārāvamutum Ārāvamutu cirāmanum rāyan kecu
kku perumpuṟak kaṭal vāmananāna periya koyil piriyanum śrīvayiṣṇa vakkaṇakku tiruvaraṅkatevan Ārāvamutāna patineṭṭu nāṭṭu śrīvayiṣṇavap piriyanum Āna Ivvanaivom śrīrājentratevar nampirāṭṭiyār tennavanmāteviyār namakku Aṭuttuk kuṭutta nilamāvatu mel pāṟkellai nīti tuṅka viḷākattukku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai rājā vāykkā m
kkellai kkālukku meṟkkum tenpāṟk kellai neriyan mātevi viḷākattukku vaṭakkum Ivvicainta pe yil Akappaṭṭa nilatte Inṉilan=tirutta śrī paṇṭārattoṭukkina Ippa ṇam nilantirutti Itukku van=ta puncey varicai paḷḷikoṇṭān marakkālāl Aḷakkak kaṭavārākavum Innellu Aiṅkalamum Āka nellu Onpatin kalamum śrīpaṇṭāratte Aḷakkakkaṭavarākavum Itu koṇṭu māci pañcami nāḷ Appamu tukku Arici mukku parup
caṟkarai nūnṟirupatin palam miḷaku ciraka ḻākku vāḻaippaḻam nūṟu teṅkam paḻam Eṭṭu Aṭaikkāyamutu Ippaṭi cantirātittavaṟ śrī paṇṭāratte viṭakkaṭavarākavum Ippaṭikku Aṭuttuk kuṭuttom Āḻvār kanmikaḷom Ivai sabhaikkaṇakku perumpuṟakkaṭal vāmana ṉāna periyakoyil piriyan Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai periyakoyil Amuta ṇa Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai
tiruvaraṅkamāḷi Eḻuttu Itu kurukaik kāvalan Ārā Amutin saṅhiñai Ippaṭi Aṟiven pāratāyan Ārā Amutu cirāman Ippaṭi Aṟiven Āritan tiruvāykkula Eḻuttu [ vīrājentratevar] nampikku me koṇṭu Ivar cevitta tirunan=tavānam cantirātittavar cellak kuṭuttu śrīvaiṣṇavarakṣai
Digital edition of SII 24.62 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
